calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Continued To Nov-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Julie Abrahamsen (Executor).

Status of the petition for final distribution was continued to November 16,2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Continued To Sep-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Julie Abrahamsen.

Ms. Young stated that the partial inventory #2 was the final inventory and that they were working on the petition for final distribution. The matter was continued to September 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Tauscher.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Continued To Aug-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution, For Allowance On Account Of Compensation To Executor And To Attorney, And For Distribution To Decedents Living Trust
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Julie Abrahamsen.

The Court approved $500,000.00 as a preliminary distribution and 50% of the statutory fees at this time (subject to a written order). Status of filing of the petition for final distribution was set for July 13, 2011.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
